title: BAP certification renewed for shrimp product line.
excerpt: Our yeast cell wall and beta-glucan products have successfully passed the Best Aquaculture Practices renewal audit, confirming eligibility for Australian market import.
body: Our shrimp product line — Yeast Cell Wall (MOS) and Yeast Beta-Glucan — has successfully passed the 2026 Best Aquaculture Practices renewal audit. The audit, conducted across our three fermentation facilities in Shanghai, confirmed continued compliance with BAP four-star standards covering feed mill operations, environmental responsibility, social accountability, food safety, and animal welfare.

This certification renewal directly maintains our eligibility for shipments into the Australian market. Australian importers can continue sourcing BAP-certified yeast cell wall and beta-glucan products without disruption to existing distribution agreements.

The audit team noted three areas of process improvement implemented during the past year: updated fermentation traceability records linking each production batch to specific raw material lots; enhanced water recycling protocols reducing facility water consumption by 18%; strengthened biosecurity controls in the cell wall processing line.

Existing customers will receive updated BAP certificates with their next shipment documentation. New buyers may request the current certificate as part of their technical due diligence — contact sales for direct delivery.

title: High-concentration selenium yeast now at 3000 ppm.
excerpt: The updated formulation delivers 3000 ppm selenium with an organic selenium ratio exceeding 98%, meeting the strictest specifications for Australian poultry producers.
body: The updated selenium yeast formulation is now available in a 3000 ppm concentration, alongside the existing 2000 ppm product. The reformulation maintains an organic selenium ratio exceeding 98%, meeting the strictest specifications required for Australian poultry producers operating under high-stress production conditions.

Higher concentration delivers two operational benefits for feed mills: reduced inclusion rate per tonne of feed (50–100 g/t vs 75–150 g/t at the previous concentration), and lower transport and storage volume per equivalent selenium delivery.

Field trials conducted with three Chinese broiler operations between November 2025 and March 2026 confirmed equivalent bioavailability between the two concentrations when dosed proportionally. Selenium retention in tissue samples measured at the upper end of the expected range across both formulations.

The 3000 ppm grade ships in standard 25 kg bags with polyethylene liner. Lead time, packaging, and storage conditions remain unchanged. Distributors and feed mills can request technical datasheets and sample quantities through the standard inquiry process.

title: New distribution agreements across Queensland.
excerpt: Three new distribution partnerships covering poultry and aquaculture operations in Queensland and New South Wales have been signed this quarter.
body: Three new distribution partnerships covering poultry and aquaculture operations in Queensland and New South Wales have been signed this quarter. The partnerships expand our Australian distribution network to seven authorised distributors across five states.

The new partners specialise in broiler and layer feed supply to commercial operations across South East Queensland; prawn and barramundi feed supply for the Far North Queensland aquaculture sector; and mixed agricultural distribution covering Northern NSW poultry operations.

Combined, the three partners service approximately 240 farm operations representing an estimated annual feed volume of 180,000 tonnes. The expansion reflects increased demand for certified yeast-derived feed additives following BAP standard updates affecting Australian shrimp imports earlier in 2026.

Farmers and feed mills in the covered regions can now access our full product range through local Australian distributors with standard 4–6 week lead times reduced to 1–2 weeks for in-stock items. For direct purchase or for regions outside the new coverage, our Shanghai sales office remains available.
